title: dortmanna scabra
intro: Dortmanna scabra, also known as the Rough-leaved Cranesbill, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Geraniaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Dortmanna scabra include its potential to reduce swelling, ease pain, and support immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for treating conditions such as arthritis and wounds. Dortmanna scabra is often prepared for herbal use through infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
